Specifies to ignore the `node_modules` directory in version control.

# Purpose
The `node_modules` directory contains all the installed dependencies for a Node.js project. These dependencies are specified in the `package.json` file and are automatically downloaded and stored in this directory when running the `npm install` command. This directory is essential for the execution of the project, as it provides the necessary libraries and modules required by the application.
